stages.concept:
# Unit 051: 과거완료 부정문과 의문문 - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 **과거완료의 부정문과 의문문**에 대해 배워볼까요?

👩‍🏫 선생님: 과거완료의 **부정문**은 **had not (hadn't) + 과거분사** 형태예요.

> I **hadn't finished** my homework when my mom came home.
> 엄마가 집에 왔을 때 나는 숙제를 끝내지 못했다.

> She **hadn't eaten** anything before she went to school.
> 그녀는 학교에 가기 전에 아무것도 먹지 않았다.

> They **hadn't met** each other before the party.
> 그들은 파티 전에 서로 만난 적이 없었다.

**Q. 다음 중 과거완료 부정문으로 올바른 것을 고르세요.**
1. He not had finished the work.
2. He hadn't finished the work. ✅
3. He didn't had finish the work.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 과거완료의 **의문문**은 **Had + 주어 + 과거분사 ~?** 형태예요.

> **Had** you finished your homework before dinner?
> 저녁 전에 숙제를 끝냈니?
> — Yes, I **had**. / No, I **hadn't**.

> **Had** she ever been to Tokyo before that trip?
> 그 여행 전에 그녀는 도쿄에 간 적이 있었니?
> — Yes, she **had**. / No, she **hadn't**.

🧑‍🎓 학생: 과거완료 부정문은 hadn't + p.p., 의문문은 Had + 주어 + p.p.? 현재완료와 형태가 비슷하군요!
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 051: 과거 완료 부정문과 의문문 - 연습문제 A

**01.** 다음 보기 중 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
They (     ) all the tickets yet when I went to the ticket booth.
> **정답** hadn't sold

---

**02.** ? she already left when you arrived?
> **정답** Had

---

**03.** He ? finished his report before the meeting started.
> **정답** hadn't

---

**04.** ? they ever been to Europe before that trip?
> **정답** Had

---

**05.** She ? eaten breakfast, so she was very hungry.
> **정답** hadn't

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
Has she finished the work before the boss came?
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** Has → Had

---

**07.** He had not went to the dentist before that day.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** went → gone

---

**08.** Had they ate lunch before the field trip?
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** ate → eaten

---

**09.** She haven't seen such a beautiful sunset before.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** haven't → hadn't

---

**10.** Had he ever meet a famous person before the event?
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** meet → met

---

**11.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
그녀는 그 소식을 아직 듣지 못했었다.
She the news yet.
> **정답** hadn't heard

---

**12.** 너는 그 전에 그를 만난 적이 있었니?
you him before?
> **정답** Had, met

---

**13.** 우리가 도착하기 전에 비가 그쳤었니?
the rain before we arrived?
> **정답** Had, stopped

---

**14.** 그는 파티 전에 케이크를 만들지 않았었다.
He the cake before the party.
> **정답** hadn't made

---

**15.** 그들은 그 전에 스키를 타 본 적이 있었니?
they ever before?
> **정답** Had, skied

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
그녀는 시험 전에 공부를 하지 않았었다.
hadn't She the exam studied before for
> **정답** She / hadn't / studied / for / the / exam / before

---

**17.** 그는 전에 뮤지컬을 본 적이 있었니?
ever he Had a musical before seen
> **정답** Had / he / ever / seen / a / musical / before

---

**18.** 우리는 그 전에 그 식당에 가 본 적이 없었다.
to hadn't We that been restaurant before
> **정답** We / hadn't / been / to / that / restaurant / before

---

**19.** 너는 중학교에 오기 전에 영어를 배운 적이 있었니?
Had learned you English before coming to middle school
> **정답** Had / you / learned / English / before / coming / to / middle / school

---

**20.** 그들은 이사하기 전에 그 집을 팔지 않았었다.
hadn't sold They the house before moving
> **정답** They / hadn't / sold / the / house / before / moving
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 051: 과거 완료 부정문과 의문문 - 연습문제 B

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
She __________ at school when the class started.
doesn't arrive
won't arrive
had not arrived
has not arrived
> **정답** had not arrived

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
He __________ for his home yet when I arrived.
doesn't leave
will leave
hadn't left
hasn't left
> **정답** hadn't left

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
I ________________ at that restaurant before today.
don't eat
had not eaten
has not eaten
won't eat
> **정답** had not eaten

---

**04.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
Amy __________ it before they had an online meeting
yesterday.
Tom __________ his homework before he went to
bed.
hasn't attended - finishes
hadn't attended - had finished
hasn't attended - has finished
hadn't attended - has finished
> **정답** hadn't attended - had finished

---

**05.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
I _____________ Amy before the rain started.
He ______________ home yet by the time the sun set.
had found - hadn't arrived
had found - not had arrived
have found - hadn't arrived
have found - hasn't arrived
> **정답** had found - hadn't arrived

---

**06.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
A: _______ they ________ in New York before it got
dark?
B: No, they __________.
Has - arrived - haven't
Had - arrived - had
Had - arrive - hadn't
Had - arrived - hadn't
> **정답** Had - arrived - hadn't

---

**07.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
A: __________ he __________ dinner when you got
there?
B: Yes. he __________. He had already eaten dinner
with his friend.
Had - had - had
Had - had - hadn't
Has - had - has
Had - have - had
> **정답** Had - had - had

---

**08.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그녀가 방에 들어 왔을 때 나는 아직 외출 준비를 끝내지
못했다.
When she came into my room, I haven't
finished preparing yet.
When she came into my room, I hadn't
finished preparing yet.
When she comes into my room, I hadn't
finished preparing yet.
When she came into my room, I don't finish
preparing yet.
> **정답** When she came into my room, I hadn't finished
preparing yet.

---

**09.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그녀가 어제 그 사실을 말할 때까지 나는 그것을 전혀 알지
못했다.
I didn't know it until she tells me the truth
yesterday.
I do never know it until she told me the truth
yesterday.
I had never known it until she told me the
truth yesterday.
I have never known it until she told me the
truth yesterday.
> **정답** I had never known it until she told me the truth
yesterday.

---

**10.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
너는 시험 보기 전에 충분히 공부를 했었니?
Have you study enough before you took the
test?
Will you study enough before you take the
test?
Had you studied enough before you took the
test?
Had you studied enough before you take the
test?
> **정답** Had you studied enough before you took the test?

---

**11.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분을 바르게 고친 것을 고르시오.
Tom does never injure his leg when he played
soccer.
will never injure
won't injure
had never injured
has never injured
> **정답** had never injured

---

**12.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 맞는 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
Amy hadn't waited for her sister when she
arrived.
Tom had never lied until then.
Jake hasn't painted the wall by the time we
got there.
Ben had eaten lunch when I call him.
> **정답** Tom had never lied until then., Amy hadn't waited
for her sister when she arrived.

---

**13.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
Because he hadn't taken a rest, he was very
tired.
They hadn't been at home when the thief
broke into the house.
When I called him, he hadn't woken up yet.
They don't turn off the lights before they went
out.
> **정답** They don't turn off the lights before they went out.

---

**14.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
When I visited him, he hadn't been there.
They hadn't escaped before the volcano
erupted.
Have you already known the answer before he
told you?
He caught a cold, because he hadn't worn a
coat the day before.
> **정답** Have you already known the answer before he told
you?

---

**15.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분을 바르게 고친 것을 고르시오.
His wish does not come true until he died.
does not come
has not come
had not come
will not come
> **정답** had not come

---

**16.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분을 바르게 고친 것을 고르시오.
Before it got cold, the squirrel doesn't gather many
acorns yet.
don't gathered
hasn't gathered
hadn't gathered
won't gather
• acorn 도토리
> **정답** hadn't gathered

---

**17.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
I has not forgotten to bring
the car key before I left
home.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** has → had

---

**18.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
When her mom entered her
room, she doesn 't finish her
homework.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** doesn 't finish → hadn't finished (had not finished)

---

**19.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
I have not saved my report
before the computer was broken.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** have → had

---

**20.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
I had not cleaned up the
mess by the time my mother
comes home.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** comes → came
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 051 과거 완료 부정문과 의문문중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 말을 이용하여 문장을 완성하시오.
그는 요리 하기 전에 촬영 준비를 끝냈니?
힌트 (     ) finish
 he  (     )  preparing for the shoot before he
cooked?
정답 Had, finished

---

**02.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 말을 이용하여 문장을 완성하시오.
나는 그때까지 미국에 가본 적이 없었다.
힌트 (     ) never, be
I  (     )   (     )   (     )  to America until then.
정답 had, never, been

---

**03.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 말을 이용하여 문장을 완성하시오.
콘서트가 시작할 때까지 그녀는 집에서 출발하지 못했다.
힌트 (     ) leave
She  (     )   (     )   (     )  home until the concert
started.
정답 had, not, left

---

**04.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 말을 이용하여 문장을 완성하시오.
나는 Peter를 만나기 전에는 캘리포니아에서 온 사람을 만
난 적이 없었다.
힌트 (     ) never, meet
I  (     )   (     )   (     )  anyone from California
before I met Peter.
정답 had, never, met

---

**05.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 말을 이용하여 대화를 완성하시오.
wash, your hands
A:  (     )  you  (     )   (     )   (     )  before you ate?
B: No, I hadn't.
정답 Had, washed, your, hands

---

**06.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 말을 이용하여 대화를 완성하시오.
take medicine
A:  (     )  you  (     )   (     )  before you went to
bed?
B: Yes I had.
• take medicine 약을 먹다
정답 Had, taken, medicine

---

**07.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 말을 이용하여 문장을 완성하시오.
그는 중학교를 졸업할 때까지 한 번도 캠핑을 가 본 적이 없
다.
힌트 (     ) never, go camping
He  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  until he graduated
from middle school.
정답 had, never, gone, camping

---

**08.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 말을 이용하여 문장을 완성하시오.
너가 외출할 때 비가 그쳤었니?
힌트 (     ) stop, raining
 it  (     )   (     )  when you went out?
정답 Had, stopped, raining

---

**09.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 말을 이용하여 문장을 완성하시오.
(축약형 사용)
엄마가 전화를 했을 때, 나는 밥을 다 먹지 않았었다.
힌트 (     ) finish, my meal
I  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  when my mother
phoned me.
정답 hadn't, finished, my, meal

---

**10.** 다음 글을 읽고 괄호 안의 단어를 이용하여 글을
완성하시오. (과거완료형으로 쓸 것)
I was very hungry when I woke up. I
[not, eat] (     )  anything for 24 hours. Yesterday
was the deadline for the midterm essay. So, I
[work] (     )  hard all night long. I didn't have
time to eat.]
정답 hadn't eaten, had worked

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 051: 과거 완료 부정문과 의문문 - 변형문제

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
She __________ at school when the lesson started.
doesn't arrive won't arrive had not arrived has not arrived
> 정답: had not arrived

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
He __________ for his home yet when I arrived. doesn't leave will leave hadn't left hasn't left
> 정답: hadn't left

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
I ________________ at that cafe before today. don't eat had not eaten has not eaten won't eat
> 정답: had not eaten

---

**04.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
Amy __________ it before they had a video call yesterday.
Tom __________ his project before he went to sleep.
hasn't attended - finishes hadn't attended - had finished hasn't attended - has finished hadn't attended - has finished
> 정답: hadn't attended - had finished

---

**05.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
I _____________ Jake before the snow started.
He ______________ home yet by the time the sun set.
had found - hadn't arrived had found - not had arrived have found - hadn't arrived have found - hasn't arrived
> 정답: had found - hadn't arrived

---

**06.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
A: _______ they ________ in Seoul before it got dark?
B: No, they __________.
Has - arrived - haven't Had - arrived - had Had - arrive - hadn't Had - arrived - hadn't
> 정답: Had - arrived - hadn't

---

**07.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
A: __________ he __________ lunch when you got there?
B: Yes. he __________.
He had already eaten lunch with his classmate.
Had - had - had Had - had - hadn't Has - had - has Had - have - had
> 정답: Had - had - had

---

**08.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그가 방에 들어 왔을 때 나는 아직 준비를 끝내지 못했다.
When he came into my room, I haven't finished preparing yet.
When he came into my room, I hadn't finished preparing yet.
When he comes into my room, I hadn't finished preparing yet.
When he came into my room, I don't finish preparing yet.
> 정답: When he came into my room, I hadn't finished

---

**09.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그가 어제 그 사실을 말할 때까지 나는 그것을 전혀 알지 못했다.
I didn't know it until he tells me the truth yesterday.
I do never know it until he told me the truth yesterday.
I had never known it until he told me the truth yesterday.
I have never known it until he told me the truth yesterday.
> 정답: I had never known it until he told me the truth

---

**10.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
너는 발표하기 전에 충분히 연습을 했었니?
Have you practice enough before you gave the presentation?
Will you practice enough before you give the presentation?
Had you practiced enough before you gave the presentation?
Had you practiced enough before you give the presentation?
> 정답: Had you practiced enough before you gave the presentation?

---

**11.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분을 바르게 고친 것을 고르시오.
Tom does never hurt his arm when he played basketball.
will never hurt won't hurt had never hurt has never hurt
> 정답: had never hurt

---

**12.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 맞는 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
Amy hadn't waited for her friend when she arrived.
Mina had never lied until then.
Jake hasn't painted the fence by the time we got there.
Tom had eaten lunch when I called him.
> 정답: Mina had never lied until then., Amy hadn't waited

---

**13.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
Because he hadn't had breakfast, he was very hungry.
They hadn't been at home when the storm started.
When I called her, she hadn't woken up yet.
They don't turn off the TV before they went out.
> 정답: They don't turn off the TV before they went out.

---

**14.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
When I visited her, she hadn't been there.
They hadn't left before the rain started.
